fields.title: Project Charter Basics
fields.key_concepts:
• Project charter defines project
• Authorizes project formally
• Defines project objectives and scope
fields.best_practices:
• Align with business goals
• Identify stakeholders early
• Be clear and concise

fields.title: Stakeholder Engagement
fields.key_concepts:
• Identify all stakeholders
• Analyze stakeholder interests
• Plan engagement strategies
fields.best_practices:
• Regular communication
• Address concerns early
• Document stakeholder requirements

fields.title: Risk & Change Management
fields.key_concepts:
• Identify potential risks
• Assess risk impact and probability
• Plan risk responses
• Manage change requests
fields.best_practices:
• Regular risk reviews
• Document all changes
• Communicate changes to stakeholders
• Update project plans accordingly
